Name.jp: ペンギン海賊・イワシ

name.zh: 要尝尝沙丁鱼的味道吗?

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to increase the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
